title: Create EventBridge Rule with Retry Policy Using AWS CLI
description: Use AWS CLI to create Amazon EventBridge Rules with schedule expressions and configure retry policies (MaximumRetryAttempts & MaximumEventAgeInSeconds) targeting AWS Lambda

introBox.headline: How it works
text: This snippet demonstrates how to create Amazon EventBridge scheduled rules with retry policies using the AWS CLI, leveraging `aws events put-rule` to create a scheduled rule and `aws events put-targets` to attach a Lambda target with a configured retry policy that controls MaximumRetryAttempts (0-185) and MaximumEventAgeInSeconds (60-86400) to handle failed invocations.

snippets.title: Copy the commands on your CLI and replace the LAMBDA_ARN. Modidy the schedule expressions and retry policy values as desired
